'''âz-s-j''' ('''kazasaj''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:isotonize|isotonize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-s-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:isotonize|isotonize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-s-j
|-
! Lemma
| kazasaj
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizasaj|thizasaj]] || [[word:jizasaj|jizasaj]] || [[word:shizasaj|shizasaj]] || [[word:kizasaj|kizasaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzasaj|thuthuzasaj]] || [[word:jujuzasaj|jujuzasaj]] || [[word:shushuzasaj|shushuzasaj]] || [[word:kukuzasaj|kukuzasaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzasaj|thuzasaj]] || [[word:juzasaj|juzasaj]] || [[word:shuzasaj|shuzasaj]] || [[word:kuzasaj|kuzasaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzasaj|thuzasaj]] || [[word:juzasaj|juzasaj]] || [[word:shuzasaj|shuzasaj]] || [[word:kuzasaj|kuzasaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezasaj|thezasaj]] || [[word:jezasaj|jezasaj]] || [[word:shezasaj|shezasaj]] || [[word:kezasaj|kezasaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozasaj|thothozasaj]] || [[word:jojozasaj|jojozasaj]] || [[word:shoshozasaj|shoshozasaj]] || [[word:kokozasaj|kokozasaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozasaj|thozasaj]] || [[word:jozasaj|jozasaj]] || [[word:shozasaj|shozasaj]] || [[word:kozasaj|kozasaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozasaj|thozasaj]] || [[word:jozasaj|jozasaj]] || [[word:shozasaj|shozasaj]] || [[word:kozasaj|kozasaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzasaj|thĂŠzasaj]] || [[word:jĂŠzasaj|jĂŠzasaj]] || [[word:shĂŠzasaj|shĂŠzasaj]] || [[word:kĂŠzasaj|kĂŠzasaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazasaj|thathazasaj]] || [[word:jajazasaj|jajazasaj]] || [[word:shashazasaj|shashazasaj]] || [[word:kakazasaj|kakazasaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazasaj|thazasaj]] || [[word:jazasaj|jazasaj]] || [[word:shazasaj|shazasaj]] || [[word:kazasaj|kazasaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazasaj|thazasaj]] || [[word:jazasaj|jazasaj]] || [[word:shazasaj|shazasaj]] || [[word:kazasaj|kazasaj]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazasaj|shazasaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazasaj|goshazasaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazasaj|gokishazasaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazasajnĂŒ|shazasajnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazasajnknĂŒ|goshazasajnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazasajnĂŒ|gokishazasajnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazasajshĂ«|shazasajshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazasajnkshĂ«|goshazasajnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazasajshĂ«|gokishazasajshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazasajro|shazasajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazasajnkro|goshazasajnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazasajro|gokishazasajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazasajmu|shazasajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazasajnkmu|goshazasajnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazasajmu|gokishazasajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazasajsher|shazasajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazasajnksher|goshazasajnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazasajsher|gokishazasajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazasajng|shazasajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazasajnkng|goshazasajnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazasajng|gokishazasajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazasajya|shazasajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazasajnkya|goshazasajnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazasajya|gokishazasajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazasajyam|shazasajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazasajnkyam|goshazasajnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazasajyam|gokishazasajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazasajnĂŒshĂ«|shazasajnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazasajnknĂŒshĂ«|goshazasajnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazasajnĂŒshĂ«|gokishazasajnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazasajnĂŒro|shazasajnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazasajnknĂŒro|goshazasajnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazasajnĂŒro|gokishazasajnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazasajnĂŒmu|shazasajnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazasajnknĂŒmu|goshazasajnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazasajnĂŒmu|gokishazasajnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazasajshĂ«nĂŒ|shazasajshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazasajnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazasajnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazasajshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazasajshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazasajshĂ«ro|shazasajshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazasajnkshĂ«ro|goshazasajnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazasajshĂ«ro|gokishazasajshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazasajshĂ«mu|shazasajshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazasajnkshĂ«mu|goshazasajnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazasajshĂ«mu|gokishazasajshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazasajronĂŒ|shazasajronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazasajnkronĂŒ|goshazasajnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazasajronĂŒ|gokishazasajronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazasajroshĂ«|shazasajroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazasajnkroshĂ«|goshazasajnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazasajroshĂ«|gokishazasajroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazasajromu|shazasajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazasajnkromu|goshazasajnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazasajromu|gokishazasajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazasajmunĂŒ|shazasajmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazasajnkmunĂŒ|goshazasajnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazasajmunĂŒ|gokishazasajmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazasajmushĂ«|shazasajmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazasajnkmushĂ«|goshazasajnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazasajmushĂ«|gokishazasajmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazasajmuro|shazasajmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazasajnkmuro|goshazasajnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazasajmuro|gokishazasajmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
